title: World Cellular Automata: A Recursive Local-World Architecture for World-State Modeling
description: Technical report v0.1 for World Cellular Automata (WCA), a recursive local-world architecture for world-state modeling. The report introduces the architecture, gives finite-set and tensor semantics, and records staged experiments across maze, WeatherBench-style, and PDEBench reaction-diffusion tasks.
notes: Replace creator metadata with final author list if needed. DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.21085154.
